habanero-honey-sweet-corn-cake.name: Habanero Honey Sweet Corn Cake
instructions: Combine fresh corn kernels, habanero pepper, eggs, water, and honey in a bowl. Puree with an immersion blender until almost smooth.
Add flour, melted butter, cornmeal, salt, and baking powder; whisk until combined.
Transfer mixture into the greased pie dish. Shake gently to settle mixture into the dish.
Bake in the center of the preheated oven until golden brown and a wooden skewer inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean, 45 to 55 minutes.
Let cool until warm or room temperature before garnishing and serving.

hake-recipe-in-green-sauce-comedera.name: Hake Recipe In Green Sauce
hake-recipe-in-green-sauce-comedera.original_name: Receta de merluza en salsa verde

ingredients.item: Un par de dientes de ajo
4 wheels of hake with a pair of cm thick
2 cucharadas soperas de harina de trigo

instructions: To start with we'll care about parsley and leave them ready. We're gonna have to wash them up and dry them up and get them tippples. The ideal would be to get an equivalent of two-thirds of pits. At the moment, we will reserve this ingredient.
Luego vamos a encargarnos del ajo. Hay que pelar los dientes y picarlos finamente o triturarlos.
The following will be to heat an oil jet into a pan or large frying pan with medium heat. That's where we'll add the garlic pieces to cook them slightly.
We'll let them fry a few minutes to get them to have a slightly golden color and often remove them to stop them from burning.
Then we'll add the flour and mix with oil and garlic. Once these ingredients have been integrated, we will pour the wine and we will mix them up again. We'll soon add the broth and mix again.
We'll let the salsa cook for a few minutes and then add the chopped parsley.
It's time to accommodate every slice of hake at the bottom of the pan or pan. A wood spatula should be used to conduct this operation by trying to avoid damage to fish.
Esperaremos entre tres  y cuatro minutos antes de voltear cada rueda para que se cocine por la otra cara.
Just as for the first side they should only cook for a limited time. It's important to pay attention to cooking time with care, because if we get through, the tires can start to get rid of them.

Let's get the pieces of hake out of the pot. Before we pour the remaining salsa onto them we'll have them tested to make sure it's well seasoned. If necessary, we'll add some more salt and mix it well.

hake-recipe-stuffed-with-smoked-salmon-c.name: Hake Recipes Stuffed with Smoked Salmon
hake-recipe-stuffed-with-smoked-salmon-c.original_name: Receta de merluza rellena de salmón ahumado
instructions: Wash the fish well.
Put them in a package with lemon juice, crossed garlic and salt and pepper.
With a thin-tipped knife, you open the steak in half, without completely separating it and trying to get it exactly through.
Carefully put salmon pits into the fish.
On a plate add the flour and some salt and pepper, and a bowl put the egg and on another plate pitted bread.
Pass the fish through the flour, and then through the beaten egg and finally through the bread.
Warm up the oil in a deep frying pan and cold every piece for 2 minutes from each side.
Serves and goes with salt and fries.

halal-cart-chicken-salad.name: Halal Cart Chicken Salad

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Heat ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil in a small saucepan over medium. Add ½ tsp. dried oregano, ½ tsp. ground coriander, ½ tsp. ground cumin, and ½ tsp. ground turmeric and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Quickly transfer to a medium bowl and whisk in 1 garlic clove, finely grated, and 3 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice. Add 2 cups shredded rotisserie chicken (from about 1 lb.) and toss to coat; season with kosher salt. Set aside.

Whisk 1 cup plain whole-milk yogurt, ¼ cup mayonnaise, ½ tsp. sugar, remaining 2 garlic cloves, finely grated, 1 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a small bowl to combine; season dressing with freshly ground pepper.
Combine 1 small red onion, thinly sliced, and 1 cup halved cherry tomatoes in a small bowl. Season with salt; toss to coat.

Cut 1 large head of iceberg lettuce into 6 wedges; cut each wedge into 3 pieces. Pour three fourths of dressing on a platter; top with lettuce and reserved chicken, then onion mixture and 1 cup salted pita chips. Drizzle remaining dressing over and season generously with pepper.

halloween-cookies-in-air-fryer-pequerece.name: Halloween Cookies In Air Fryer
halloween-cookies-in-air-fryer-pequerece.original_name: Galletas de Halloween en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: Papel de hornear para freidora de aire (p.ej. este)

instructions: In a bowl or in a kitchen robot, we mix sugar, steamed sugar and butter into cubes at room temperature up to a homogenous mass. We add the egg and we beat just for a moment, enough to get it integrated well.
Tamizamos la harina y la combinamos con el polvo de hornear. Incorporamos gradualmente esta mezcla a la masa y amasamos hasta obtener una textura uniforme.
Colocamos la masa en papel film y la refrigeramos durante al menos 30 minutos.

After rest, we remove the dough from the refrigerator. We can divide them into two or three parts and work with only one portion at a time to avoid them from seawing too much. With a roller, we extend the mass up to a thickness of about 0,5 cm.
With a heart-shaped cookie cutter (we have been using this), we cut as many hearts as mass allows.
With a sharp knife, we cut every heart in half.

With our hands, we shape every half of our heart to turn it into a small ghost, allowing the end of our heart sometimes to stay to the right and sometimes to the left, so that every ghost has a different form.

We have been pressurizing air frying for 3 minutes at 175 and 3 minutes. We place baking paper for air fryer onto the plate. We distribute the cookies onto the airfryer's plate, leaving space with them to get them to conduct the air well. Depending on the size of the cookies and frying, they will be more or less suitable and in our experience about 9 cookies per batch. We bake for 6-8 minutes at 175 and 3 minutes till the edges are slightly golden. The first times it's best to check at 6 minutes and get up from minute to minute until they're ready as each fryer works differently. If we want to make more cookies, we repeat the steps to bake them all.

Check that cookies are well made up and down. In some models of airfryer the bottom can be somewhat raw and if it happens, turn the cookies carefully and bake 1-2 minutes more at the same temperature. We remove the cookies from the fryer and let them cool onto a grid.

We prepared the glazing by mixing 180 g of sugar with 3-4 tablespoons of tibia milk. We mix up to get a smooth and a little thick consistency, that can be tipppled or poured without being too tipsy. We filled a small pastry sleeve or a pint with the frying and cut a very fine tipple. First, we figure out every ghost with the frying and then we complete the inside up to cover the whole surface. We use a stick or the end of a spoon to spread the frying and level it. We let the frying dry a little, about 30 minutes at room temperature.

When the frying's firm but still a little moist, we use a black padded pencil to draw every ghost's eyes and mouth. With a red pastry pencil, we add cheeks if we want to give them a fun touch. We let completely dry before we manipulate or serve cookies.
Once the frying and details are completely dry, cookies are ready to enjoy or to give away. A good and fun Christmas ghost!

halloween-inspired-spicy-tomato-cream-pa.name: Halloween-inspired Spicy Tomato Cream Pasta
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the pasta and cook according to the package instructions until al dente, then drain, reserving ⅓ cup of the pasta cooking water.

Meanwhile, in a large skillet over low heat, melt together the butter and olive oil until beginning to bubble. Add the garlic and shallot and cook until golden, 2–3 minutes. Add the red pepper flakes and tomato paste and stir until evenly incorporated.
Add the tomato sauce and heavy cream and stir the sauce for 2–3 minutes, until smooth and warmed through.

Add half of the basil and the cooked pasta and stir to coat in the sauce, then add ½ cup of Parmesan cheese and stir until incorporated and melted. If the sauce is too thick, add some of the reserved pasta water. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Divide the pasta between bowls and garnish with the remaining basil and Parmesan cheese. Serve immediately.
Enjoy!

hamburger-stew-with-brown-gravy.name: Hamburger Stew With Brown Gravy

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place potatoes, onion, and garlic in a large pot. Add enough water to cover. Season with salt and pepper and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until potatoes are tender, 15 to 20 minutes.
While potatoes are cooking, heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir ground beef in the hot skillet until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Drain and discard grease.
Add beef to potato mixture; cook stew over medium heat for 15 minutes.
Combine water and gravy mix in a small bowl; stir into stew very slowly. Let simmer until thickened, about 20 minutes. Taste and adjust salt and pepper.

hazelnut-biscotti-recipe-lezzet.name: Hazelnut Biscotti Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 pcs big size egg (in room temperature)
60 ml liquid oil (zeytiny or sunflower oil)
150 gr roasted nuts (seeded or cork broken)
Full wheat flour (more fiber and tok flavor)
Badem flour (for free version, but its circulation slightly)
Brunette sugar (task taste and more dense color)
Honey or akçayeç Seasoning (more soft and aromatic end)
Walnut (a different flavor with the aroma of bitterness)
Antep nuts (more colorful and aromatic appearance)
Lemon or tangerine peel rendesi (a more spacious taste)
Drop chocolate (for sweet and spark balance)
Dryüzüm or dried pieces(milk fruit taste)

instructions: 1. Heat the oven to 170 degrees (sub-top adjustment).
2. Oiled k&acirc on the oven tray is cool.
3. Eggs and sugar in a large container, as the sugar is completely melted rub.
4. Add liquid oil to the mixture of vanilla and orange peel (or comb)
5. Mix flour, baking powder and salt in a separate container, then add it to liquid mixture.
6. Add nuts to the dough and make the dough evenly dispersed.
7. Pulp divided into two equal parts.
8. Make long thin rolls (about 30 cm) on the lightly sprinkled countertop, press the lightly upress the car and place push in the tray.
9. 170 degrees 25–30 minutes, u bake the car to light-girl.
10. Leave the tray from 10 minutes to cool.
11. 11. Then cut into slices of 1.5 cm thickness.
12. Cook the slices into the tray again and 150 degrees, both sides will be 8–10 minutes.
12. August Fully cool.
14.  Afiyet olsun.

healthy-smoothie-bowl-blue-magik-bowl-th.name: Healthy Smoothie Bowl: Blue Magik Bowl: The Lotus Coconut
instructions: In a blender, add banana, frozen strawberries, frozen mango, and Blue Majik powder. Add milk of choice and blend until texture is a soft-serve consistency.
Pour smoothie into bowl and add fresh star fruit, mango, coconut, and chia seeds on top.
Enjoy!

herb-crusted-rack-of-lamb.name: Herb-crusted Rack Of Lamb

ingredients.item: Frenched racks of lamb (each rack 1 0.5 lb.)
ingredients.prep: trimmed of all but a thin layer of fat

ingredients.item: New garlic or 3 large regular garlic cloves

instructions: Heat 12" heavy skillet over high heat until hot, at least 2 minutes.

Pat dry 2 (8-rib) frenched racks of lamb (each rack 1½ lb.), trimmed of all but a thin layer of fat; rub meat all over with 1½ tsp. kosher salt and ¾ tsp. freshly ground black pepper. Add 1 tsp. vegetable oil to hot skillet. Sear racks, in 2 batches if necessary, until brown on all sides (not ends), about 10 minutes per batch. Transfer racks to a small roasting pan or baking sheet.
Put oven rack in middle position; preheat oven to 177°C.

Stir together ½ head new garlic or 3 large regular garlic cloves, minced, ¼ cup finely chopped fresh parsley, 1 Tbsp. finely chopped fresh thyme, 2 tsp. finely chopped fresh rosemary, 1½ Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, and remaining ½ tsp. kosher salt and ½ tsp. freshly ground black pepper. Coat meaty parts of lamb with herb mixture, pressing to help adhere. Roast 15–25 minutes, until meat thermometer inserted diagonally into center of lamb registers 52°C (tent loosely with foil after 15 minutes so the frenched bones don’t burn).

Let stand, covered, 10 minutes. (Internal temperature will rise to 54°C for medium-rare while lamb stands.) Cut each rack into 4 double lamb chops. 

Editor’s note: This roasted rack of lamb recipe was first printed in the July 2006 issue of ‘Gourmet’ as ‘Rack of Lamb With Garlic and Herbs.’ Head this way for more of our favorite New Year’s Eve dinner ideas →

herbed-prime-rib-roast-with-red-wine-sau.name: Herbed Prime Rib Roast With Red Wine Sauce
instructions: Place oven bag in a roasting pan at least 2 inches deep.

Whisk wine, shallots, olive oil, flour, Worcestershire sauce, garlic, rosemary, sage, thyme, salt, and black pepper together in a bowl; pour into the bag. Add rib roast; coat with marinade. Close bag with tie (found inside package). Marinate in the refrigerator for 6 to 24 hours, flipping bag occasionally.
Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).

Cut six ½-inch slits in top of bag to allow steam to escape. Insert an oven-safe meat thermometer through one of the slits into center of roast, making sure thermometer does not touch bone. Tuck ends of bag in the pan.
Place pan in the oven, allowing room for the bag to expand during cooking without touching heating elements, wall, or racks. Bag should not hang over the pan.
Cook in the preheated oven until desired doneness. Allow 1 ¾ to 2 ¼ hours for medium-rare, 57°C (57 degrees C), or 2 ¼ to 2 ¾ hours for medium, 66°C (65 degrees C).

Let stand in oven bag for 15 minutes. The temperature of the meat after standing should be 63°C (63 degrees C) for medium-rare or 71°C (70 degrees C) for medium. Carefully cut open top of oven bag. Remember: Always support bag with pan.

Transfer roast to a cutting board; carve. Carefully drain juices from the oven bag into a baking dish; discard bag. Skim excess fat from juices; stir butter into juices. Serve hot pan juices over sliced roast.

high-altitude-buttermilk-devils-food-cak.name: High-altitude Buttermilk Devil's Food Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Coat three 9-inch round cake pans generously with cooking spray.
Mix cake flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt together in a large bowl.

Beat white sugar, 1 cup butter, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract, and 1 teaspoon almond extract together in a large bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed until light and fluffy. Pour in half of the buttermilk and mix well. Beat in eggs one at a time.

Beat half of the flour mixture into the creamed butter mixture. Add remaining buttermilk; beat well to combine. Add remaining flour mixture and beat until batter is smooth, about 1 minute. Pour batter into prepared cake pans.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the centers comes out clean, 26 to 30 minutes. Let cool in pans, about 15 minutes. Invert onto wire racks and cool completely before frosting, about 45 minutes.

Beat 1 1/4 cups butter, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract, and 1 teaspoon almond extract in a large bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed until creamy. Beat in milk gradually. Add confectioners' sugar, 2 cups at a time, scraping sides of the bowl as needed, until frosting is smooth. Increase speed to high and beat, adding more milk, 1 tablespoon at a time, until frosting is fluffy and spreadable.
Spread frosting between cake layers and smooth over top and sides of cake.

holiday-punch.name: Holiday Punch
instructions: Combine sugar, cranberry juice, pineapple juice, and almond extract in a large container, mix together and refrigerate until chilled.
To serve, pour juice mixture into a punch bowl. Stir in ginger ale.

honey-barbecue-sauce.name: Honey Barbecue Sauce
instructions: In a large, shallow saucepan, combine the onion, garlic, and water. Cook over medium heat until the onion is translucent and softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the ketchup, apple cider vinegar, honey, and mustard powder. Continue cooking for 20 minutes, until the sauce is thickened. Season with salt and pepper.
Remove the pan from the heat. Using an immersion blender, puree the sauce until smooth. Let cool completely, about 25 minutes.
Transfer to a clean airtight container and store in the refrigerator. The barbecue sauce will keep for up to 4 days.
Enjoy!

honey-lime-grilled-shrimp-salad.name: Honey Lime Grilled Shrimp Salad
instructions: Dressing: Place all the ingredients in a food processor. Process for about 1 minute until emulsified. Set aside.
In a large bowl, mix together olive oil, honey, McCormick® ground cumin, paprika, garlic powder, lime zest, salt, and pepper. Add shrimp and toss to coat. Thread shrimp onto soaked bamboo skewers.

Heat grill or grill pan to medium-high heat. Place shrimp skewers and the corn on the grill and close the lid. Grill for 4 minutes, then flip skewers. Grill for 3 minutes on the second side, then take the skewers off the grill. Rotate corn to get light grill marks. (Corn will take about 5 minutes longer than the shrimp.) Take the corn off the grill.
Pull the shrimp off the skewers. Slice corn off the cob.

Assemble the salad: On a platter, arrange the mixed baby greens. Scatter the tomatoes, radishes, and avocado on top. Add the shrimp and corn. Scatter sliced scallion over the salad. Drizzle with the dressing. Serve!
Enjoy!

honey-berry-kombucha-spritzer.name: Honey-berry-kombucha Spritzer

ingredients.item: Mint or basil leaves; plus more for serving
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place 4 oz. fresh blackberries or other juicy, tender fruit, ⅓ cup mint or basil leaves, 1 Tbsp. honey, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large pitcher and muddle until very well combined and blackberries are completely smashed and syrupy. Add 32 oz. kombucha and stir gently to combine. Taste spritzer and add more honey if desired.
Strain spritzer into tall glasses filled with ice and garnish each with a sprig of mint or basil if desired.

hot-cross-buns.name: Hot Cross Buns

ingredients.prep: such as currants, raisins, chopped apricots

instructions: Whisk yeast, honey, and 1 cup milk in the large bowl of a stand mixer. Let sit until foamy, about 5 minutes. Meanwhile, butter a large mixing bowl and a 13x9" baking dish; set aside.

Whisk 1 egg, egg yolk, brown sugar, oil, zests, and vanilla into yeast mixture. Add cinnamon, cardamom, and 3½ cups flour and beat with dough hook on low speed until mixture starts to form a shaggy dough. Add salt and beat on medium until dough forms a ball around the hook, 1–2 minutes. Continue beating until dough is smooth and slightly tacky, about 5 minutes more. Add ½ cup butter, 1 Tbsp. at a time, allowing dough to absorb each piece before adding the next, then beat until dough is supple, shiny, and elastic, about 5 minutes.

Turn out dough onto a clean work surface and knead with your hands, incorporating remaining 2 Tbsp. flour, until dough is very supple and tacky but not sticky, about 5 minutes. Transfer to prepared bowl and cover with plastic. Let dough sit in a warm place until doubled in size, 40–50 minutes.

Turn dough out onto a clean work surface and pat down to ½" thick (the shape doesn’t matter). Scatter dried fruit over surface of dough and roll up into a log, starting at the end nearest you. Divide log into 12 equal pieces (if you’re using a scale, each piece should be a little less than 3½ oz.). Roll each piece into a smooth ball and arrange in prepared baking dish, spacing equally in a 4x3 grid. Cover dish tightly with plastic and let sit in a warm place until balls have nearly doubled in size and are touching, 30–40 minutes.

Preheat oven to 350°. Beat remaining egg with 1 tsp. water and brush over tops of buns. Bake buns until tops and bottoms are deep golden brown, 25–35 minutes. Let cool slightly in pan. Brush jam onto warm buns, then let cool until jam is set.

Whisk powdered sugar and remaining 4 tsp. milk in a small bowl until smooth. Transfer to a pastry bag or resealable plastic bag. Cut a small opening in 1 corner, then pipe crosses over each bun. Let sit until icing is set, at least 15 minutes.
Do Ahead: Dough, without fruit, can be made 1 day ahead. Let rise at room temperature, then cover and chill.

hot-muffuletta-dip.name: Hot Muffuletta Dip
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Mix cream cheese, salami, olives, roasted red peppers, giardiniera, provolone cheese, and garlic together in a bowl; transfer to a 9-inch pie plate.
Bake in the preheated oven until bubbling and hot, about 30 minutes. Sprinkle parsley over dip.

hot-pink-punch.name: Hot Pink Punch

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 tbsp. plus  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Aleppo-style or other mild red pepper flakes

ingredients.prep: rind removed, flesh cut into large cubes (about 5 cups)

instructions: Stir together 2 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 Tbsp. plus ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt and ½ tsp. Aleppo-style or other mild red pepper flakes on a small plate. Moisten half of rim of 6 rocks glasses with ½ lemon, then press into chile salt to coat. Set aside.

Purée 4 lb. seedless watermelon, rind removed, flesh cut into large cubes (about 5 cups), in a blender until smooth. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a pitcher, pressing on solids; discard solids. (You should have 3–3½ cups juice.) Add 1 cup gin, ½ cup fresh lemon juice, and 3 Tbsp. Campari to pitcher; stir well to combine.
Fill prepared glasses with ice; divide punch among glasses.

how-to-make-a-delicious-coco-loco-step-b.name: How To Make A Delicious Coco Loco Step By Step
how-to-make-a-delicious-coco-loco-step-b.original_name: Cómo paso un delicioso coco loco paso a paso
instructions: To make this cocktail you can use a pitcher to make the process easier. Now, if you have no problems with them, use a bottle with a tap where you can shake the mixture.
In the container, you will add vodka and rum and tequila and awaken or mingle till all spirits are added.
Then you will add the coconut cream next to the lemon juice and the ice. Retiring or intermingling will be necessary until all have been fully integrated.
The mixture will be ready once the liquors have been merged with the coconut cream and lemon juice and the ice have been frosted.
Serves in a big glass or glass, decorates with a Sorbet, Pitillo or straw. Also you can decorate with some slice of lemon and ready.
Enjoy!

how-to-make-a-delicious-rigatoni-with-pe.name: How To Make A Delicious Rigatoni With Pesto
how-to-make-a-delicious-rigatoni-with-pe.original_name: Cómo hacer un rico rigatoni al pesto

ingredients.item: 1 taza de hojas de albahaca fresca
40 gr de queso pecorino rallado (puede usarse parmesano)
40 ml de aceite de oliva extra virgen
Sal y pimienta negra al gusto

instructions: Cooking rigatoni with abundant water with salt till the dente. Reserve some cooking water.
In a processor, shredder the basil, elk, roasted almonds and garlic up to a granulated mixture.
Add the pecorino cheese, juice and lemon grates. Reprocessing.
Incorporate olive oil slowly to emulate. Add one or two tablespoons of hot cooking water to suit texture.
Retitle salt and pepper. If you want a more creamy sauce, integrate the cream or ricotta cheese and process a few seconds.
Mezclar el rigatoni cocido con el pesto en un bowl caliente para que la pasta absorba el sabor.
Serve with an additional touch of shredded almond or lemon frying.

how-to-make-a-tuna-melt.name: How To Make A Tuna Melt

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place tuna into a mixing bowl and lightly break it apart with a fork. Add celery, green onion, capers, mayonnaise, and chile paste. Pinch in small pieces mozzarella and stir to mix. Season with salt and black pepper; refrigerate tuna salad until needed.
Preheat the oven's broiler. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.
Spread butter generously on both sides of French bread slices.

Broil buttered bread until golden brown on top, 2 to 3 minutes. Flip bread slices and broil other side until toasted, 2 to 3 more minutes. Remove from the oven and turn bread slices over on the baking sheet so the darkest sides are on the bottom.

Gently spread tuna salad onto bread slices using 2 forks. Press the salad onto the bread and spread tuna all the way to the edges of the bread. Spread shredded Cheddar over each sandwich. Dust tops with cayenne pepper.
Place sandwiches under the broiler and cook until cheese is melted and bubbling, 5 to 6 minutes.

how-to-make-brownies.name: How To Make Brownies
instructions: Grease a 9x13-inch (23x33-cm) dark metal pan with softened butter, then line with parchment paper, leaving overhang on all sides. Grease the parchment with softened butter.
Combine the chopped chocolate, ¼ cup (30 g) of cocoa powder, and espresso powder in a heatproof liquid measuring cup or medium bowl and set aside.

Add the butter to a small saucepan over medium heat and cook until the butter just comes to a vigorous simmer, about 5 minutes, swirling the pan occasionally. Immediately pour the hot butter over the chocolate mixture and let sit for 2 minutes. Whisk until the chocolate is completely smooth and melted, then set aside.

Combine the granulated sugar, brown sugar, vanilla extract, salt, and eggs in a large bowl. Beat with an electric hand mixer on high speed until light and fluffy, about 10 minutes. It will be similar to the texture of very thick pancake batter.
With the mixer on, pour in the slightly cooled chocolate and butter mixture and blend until smooth.
Position a rack in the middle of the oven and preheat to 177°C (180°C).
Sift in the flour and remaining cocoa powder and use a rubber spatula to gently fold until just combined.
Pour the batter into the prepared baking pan and smooth the top with a spatula. Bake until lightly puffed on top, about 20 minutes.
Remove the baking pan from the oven using oven mitts or kitchen towels, then lightly drop the pan on a flat surface 1-2 times until the brownies deflate slightly. Sprinkle with flaky sea salt.

Return the pan to the oven and bake until a wooden skewer inserted into the center of the brownies comes out fudgy but the edges look cooked through, about 20 minutes more. The center of the brownies will seem under-baked, but the brownies will continue to set as they cool.
Set the brownies on a cooling rack and cool completely in the pan.
Use the parchment paper to lift the cooled brownies out of the pan. Cut into 24 bars and serve immediately.
Enjoy!

how-to-make-cannelloni-stuffed-with-turk.name: How To Make Cannelloni Stuffed With Turkey In Tomato Sauce
how-to-make-cannelloni-stuffed-with-turk.original_name: Cómo hacer canelones rellenos de pavo en salsa de tomate
instructions: Cut the onion into small pieces. Fold the garlic.
Warm an olive oil casserole and pour onion with garlic till clear.
Luego, incorpora el pavo y condimenta con sal y pimienta al gusto. Mezcla y cocina a fuego medio por 7 minutos.
Then pour the white wine, pasta and tomato concentrate. Meg and cook with medium heat for 10 minutes till protein is cooked and salsa takes consistency.
When the turkey's been cooked, turn off and leave to stand.
Minetra so much, preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Take the canelones and fill with turkey with salsa and get sitting on a plate. When they're all stuffed up, scattering above and above the salsa that remained.
Luego, ralla el queso mozzarella y esparce.
Hornea los canelones por 25 minutos hasta que se cocine la pasta y el queso gratine.
Pasado ese tiempo, saca del horno y sirve los canelones.
Enjoy!

how-to-make-caramelized-almond-nougat-co.name: How To Make Caramelized Almond Nougat
how-to-make-caramelized-almond-nougat-co.original_name: Cómo hacer turrón de almendras caramelizadas

ingredients.item: 300 gr de almendras  (crudas y con piel)

instructions: It purifies the oven at 170 ″.
Put the almonds on a plate and purple for 12 to 15 minutes. That's right.
Retira del horno y reserva.
It incorporates sugar into a pot and leads to fire.
Cooking at medium heat - low till the sugar dissolve and get an amber caramel.
Add the honey and lemon juice, mix very well till integrated.
Add toasted almonds and salt, mix until they are washed with caramel.
Expand the mixture onto an oven paper or a mold for Silicone turret.
Deja enfriar hasta que endurezca y trocea en porciones.
Enjoy!

how-to-make-chaufa-rice-with-pork-comede.name: How To Make Chaufa Rice With Pork
how-to-make-chaufa-rice-with-pork-comede.original_name: Cómo hacer arroz chaufa con cerdo
instructions: He pics a fine tender beetle to make it the base of his rice, and also pits his Red Pimento by withdrawing his seeds and his white parts. Peel the carrot and paddle it into small squares.
Bat the eggs by the cuffs and add them to the frying pan to prepare a French-style omelette.
Tritura el diente de ajo con el jengibre y un poco de aceite hasta hacer una pasta. Reserva.
It also pics the very fine (green) Chinese onions and cuts the pork into squares.

Warm a frying pan or a wok with high heat and add oil with garlic and ginger dough and just a few seconds till it starts to glow and add the minced white beetle (not Chinese), the red pepper and carrot. Jumps and doesn't get burned.
Add the minced and sauté so that it mats well from the outside and cooks from inside.
Add the baked rice and let them touch slightly, all with high heat, in the frying pan.
Add all sauces and remove well, peppermint.
Also incorporates an omelette at the last minute and a minced Chinese green onions.
Saltea a fuego fuerte sin dejar de remover.
Sirve caliente.
